concerns.text: FR-010 (comprehensive log file) is not explicitly linked to any user story; it appears as a cross‑cutting requirement but the spec does not state which story mandates logging, leaving it an orphaned functional requirement.

SC-004 specifies PNG dimensions (≥1200 × 800 px), yet FR-008 only requires a “high‑resolution PNG” without dimension details, creating a mismatch between the success criterion and its backing functional requirement.
